series_metadata.series_title: Unitization Applications and Supplements, and Amendments to Unit Orders
series_metadata.series_description: Applications for Unit Operations or Requests for Amendments filed with the Division by an Operator or by the Chief on their Own Motion and all Supplements to those Applications or Requests. This includes the cover letter and filing fee for the Application or Request.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 7 years after the revocation of a unit order; or 2 years after the withdrawal of a pending application or pending request for amendment. If records are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be shredded at that time. ; Electronic: 7 years after the revocation of a unit order; or 2 years after the withdrawal of a pending application or pending request for amendment., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
